name: MDM Group, Inc.
summary: MDM Group Inc. is a technologies research and development company that provides network and Internet based security products and services, Internet protocol (IP) communication technologies, application development, and computer processing technologies. The company offers IT assessment, audit, and compliance services and security and IT and network products and solutions. The products are used in Internet and private network data and transaction protection, identity and privacy protection, encryption, medical imaging, military and training, video conferencing, and digital credit card and financial transaction protection applications. MDM partners with HPS, Pandora Networks, and Trusted Systems Laboratories. It is based in Vancouver, Canada.
